subject: FW: Updated Icahn Partners LP Offering Documents - No Action Required
body:
From: Icahn Management [mailto:icahnmanagement@icahnmgmt.com] 
Sent: Thursday, December 27, 2007 1:32 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Cc: dkiesq@aol.com
Subject: Updated Icahn Partners LP Offering Documents - No Action
Required

 

Dear Jeff, 
Attached please find a revised Icahn Partners LP PPM and Limited
Partnership Agreement as well as an updated version of the additional
subscription form dated January 2008.  Please note no action is
required.  We are circulating both clean and blacklined versions of the
revised documents for your reference. 

On a go forward basis, the current 2.5% management fee will be replaced
with a 2.5% special profits allocation effective January 1, 2008.  The
calculation of the amount of the allocation will not change.  However,
the management fee is currently withdrawn on a quarterly basis in
advance, whereas the allocation will now be withdrawn annually on
December 31st, assuming the Fund is profitable.  If the Fund's profits
are not sufficient to make the 2.5% allocation, the excess allocation
will be carried forward.  For administrative purposes, Icahn Capital LP
will replace Icahn Capital Management LP.

Please contact Rupal Doshi (212.702.4378) or Dana Witkin (212.702.4371)
with any questions. 

Happy Holidays. 

Icahn Capital Management LP 
767 Fifth Avenue, 47th Floor 
New York, NY 10153 
P: 212-702-4300 
F: 347-649-2027 
E: icahnmanagement@icahnmgmt.com 
  
Disclaimer: 
This e-mail, including any files or attachments transmitted, is
confidential and intended solely for the use of the individual or entity
to which it is addressed.  If you are not the intended recipient of the
e-mail, you may not review, retransmit, convert to hard copy, use, rely
upon, or disseminate this e-mail.  If you have received this e-mail in
error, please immediately notify, by replying to the sender, and delete
it from any computer to which it was erroneously directed. This
communication is for information purposes only and should not be
regarded as an offer to sell or as a solicitation of an offer to buy any
financial product, an official confirmation of any transaction, or as an
official statement of Icahn Capital Management LP.

  
Mr. Darren Indyke
body_html:
From: Icahn Management [mailto:icahnmanagement@icahnmgmt.com]
Sent: Thursday, December 27, 2007 1:32 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Cc: dkiesq@aol.com
Subject: Updated Icahn Partners LP Offering Documents - No Action Required

 

Dear Jeff,
Attached please find a revised Icahn Partners LP PPM and Limited Partnership Agreement as well as an updated version of the additional subscription form dated January 2008.  Please note no action is required.  We are circulating both clean and blacklined versions of the revised documents for your reference.

On a go forward basis, the current 2.5% management fee will be replaced with a 2.5% special profits allocation effective January 1, 2008.  The calculation of the amount of the allocation will not change.  However, the management fee is currently withdrawn on a quarterly basis in advance, whereas the allocation will now be withdrawn annually on December 31st, assuming the Fund is profitable.  If the Fund's profits are not sufficient to make the 2.5% allocation, the excess allocation will be carried forward.  For administrative purposes, Icahn Capital LP will replace Icahn Capital Management LP.

Please contact Rupal Doshi (212.702.4378) or Dana Witkin (212.702.4371) with any questions.

Happy Holidays.

Icahn Capital Management LP
767 Fifth Avenue, 47th Floor
New York, NY 10153
P: 212-702-4300
F: 347-649-2027
E: icahnmanagement@icahnmgmt.com
 
Disclaimer:
This e-mail, including any files or attachments transmitted, is confidential and intended solely for the use of the individual or entity to which it is addressed.  If you are not the intended recipient of the e-mail, you may not review, retransmit, convert to hard copy, use, rely upon, or disseminate this e-mail.  If you have received this e-mail in error, please immediately notify, by replying to the sender, and delete it from any computer to which it was erroneously directed. This communication is for information purposes only and should not be regarded as an offer to sell or as a solicitation of an offer to buy any financial product, an official confirmation of any transaction, or as an official statement of Icahn Capital Management LP.

 
Mr. Darren Indyke
